nodes.title: List Operation Types
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/operation-types with Authorization header. Returns array of operation types with {id, name, category, defaultFromAccountId, defaultToAccountId, warehouseId, fields[]}. Categories include: voucher, journal, warehouse.

nodes.title: Create Operation Type
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/operation-types with {name, category, defaultFromAccountId?, defaultToAccountId?, warehouseId?, fields?[]}. Creates operation type template. Returns created type. Returns 400 if name already exists.

nodes.title: Update Operation Type
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/operation-types/:id with {name?, category?, defaultFromAccountId?, defaultToAccountId?, warehouseId?, fields?[]}. Updates operation type fields. Returns updated type.

nodes.title: Delete Operation Type
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/operation-types/:id. Removes operation type. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Check Operation Type Name
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/operation-types/check-name?name=X with Authorization header. Returns {available: true} if name is unique, {available: false} if name already exists in business.
